mapper.select: SELECT id, card_code AS cardCode, name, team_id AS teamId, role, grade, overall, back_number AS backNumber, birth_date AS birthDate, bat_throw AS batThrow, positions, traits, attributes, created_at AS createdAt FROM player_legend WHERE role = #{target} ORDER BY name, overall DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO player_card ( card_code, name, team_id, role, grade, season_year, overall, back_number, birth_date, bat_throw, positions, traits ) VALUES ( #{cardCode}, #{name}, #{teamId}, #{role}, #{grade}, #{seasonYear}, #{overall}, #{backNumber}, #{birthDate}, #{batThrow}, #{positions}, #{traits} )
INSERT INTO player_card_hitter_attributes ( card_id, accuracy, power, contact, speed, defense ) VALUES ( #{cardId}, #{accuracy}, #{power}, #{contact}, #{speed}, #{defense} )
INSERT INTO player_card_pitcher_attributes ( card_id, control, velocity, stamina, fastball, breaking ) VALUES ( #{cardId}, #{control}, #{velocity}, #{stamina}, #{fastball}, #{breaking} )
